user.title: MeteoAlarm country
user.description: Pick the country whose weather warnings you want to follow. You can also type a custom feed slug exactly as it appears in the feeds.meteoalarm.org URL (for example `latvia`).

region.title: Region in {country}
region.description: Pick your region. The list only contains regions that currently have active warnings ({region_count} right now) - if yours is missing, type its name exactly as MeteoAlarm publishes it (for example `Riga` or `Smiltene municipality`).

data_description.language: Only languages published by your country's weather service are available; other choices fall back to English.

error.invalid_country: This country has no MeteoAlarm feed. Use the exact slug from the feeds.meteoalarm.org URL.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach feeds.meteoalarm.org to validate the custom country.
